## Related Issue

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the **backticks-only** quote style.
- [ ] I have removed all semicolons.
- [ ] Imports are organized and separated by comments (e.g., // Types, // Services).
- [ ] There is a new line at the end of every file.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings/errors.
